title: Use of Want
description: Learn to use 'Want' — expressing desires, wishes, and needs. Want is one of the most frequently used verbs in spoken English. Master want, wants, want to + verb, and want + object.

subtopics.title: Want — Basic Usage
subtopics.description: I want tea. We want peace. Basic sentences with want.

subtopics.title: Wants — Third Person Singular
subtopics.description: She wants coffee. He wants a job. Third person singular form.

subtopics.title: Want in Questions
subtopics.description: Do you want tea? Does she want to go? Questions with want.

subtopics.title: Want in Negatives
subtopics.description: I don't want this. She doesn't want to come. Negative sentences.

subtopics.title: Want to + Verb
subtopics.description: I want to eat. She wants to study. Want + to + base verb structure.
